scripts.contracts:test: pnpm js:test && pnpm python:test && pnpm rust:test && pnpm cpp:test
scripts.js:check: pnpm --dir packages/js/core run check && pnpm --dir packages/js/node run check
scripts.js:test: pnpm --dir packages/js/core run test && pnpm --dir packages/js/node run test
scripts.python:twine: cd packages/python && python -m twine check dist/*
scripts.cpp:test: cmake -S packages/cpp -B packages/cpp/build && cmake --build packages/cpp/build --config Release && ctest --test-dir packages/cpp/build -C Release --output-on-failure
